_comment: Shipped DEFAULT config. User overrides live in ~/.config/picopi/config.json (same for every install). Roles map to an alias + thinking + timeout; each alias is an ordered list of provider/id models, first with a working API key wins.

aliases._comment: Starting point — set these to any provider/model pi supports (see pi's provider docs). Ordered: preferred first, fallbacks after; first with a working key wins.

compaction._comment: Optional: use a cheaper model for context summarization. Falls back to session model if not set/unavailable.

webSearch._comment: Drives the built-in web_search tool (web.ts) and the web-searcher subagent role. provider: exa|perplexity|brave|duckduckgo|auto. searchModel applies to perplexity. API keys come from env (EXA_API_KEY/PERPLEXITY_API_KEY/BRAVE_API_KEY); none needed for duckduckgo.
